retention:
WITH cohorts AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id,
         date_trunc('week', created_at)::date AS cohort_week,
         created_at::date AS signup_date
  FROM users
  WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('week', now()) - interval '10 weeks'
    AND created_at <  date_trunc('week', now())            -- exclude current partial week
),
pl AS (
  SELECT user_id, prayer_date
  FROM prayer_logs
  WHERE prayer_date >= (SELECT min(signup_date) FROM cohorts)
    AND prayer_date <= now()::date
    AND status IN ('on_time','late')                       -- a completed/logged prayer
),
joined AS (
  SELECT c.cohort_week, c.user_id,
         bool_or(p.prayer_date BETWEEN c.signup_date + 1  AND c.signup_date + 2)  AS d1,
         bool_or(p.prayer_date BETWEEN c.signup_date + 7  AND c.signup_date + 9)  AS d7,
         bool_or(p.prayer_date BETWEEN c.signup_date + 28 AND c.signup_date + 31) AS d30,
         max(c.signup_date) AS signup_date
  FROM cohorts c
  LEFT JOIN pl p ON p.user_id = c.user_id
  GROUP BY c.cohort_week, c.user_id
)
SELECT cohort_week,
       count(*) AS size,
       round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE d1)  / count(*), 1) AS d1,
       CASE WHEN now()::date - max(signup_date) >= 9
            THEN round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE d7) / count(*), 1) END AS d7,
       CASE WHEN now()::date - max(signup_date) >= 31
            THEN round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE d30) / count(*), 1) END AS d30
FROM joined
GROUP BY cohort_week
ORDER BY cohort_week;
geo:
-- Top countries by geocoded location (location_cache is the only geo signal; user_preferences.country/timezone/coords are 100% empty, users.language is 100% hardcoded 'en').
-- CAVEAT: location_cache is keyed by rounded lat/lng (one row per distinct location, NOT per-user), so this is a distribution of distinct queried locations, a proxy for user geography rather than a user-weighted count.
WITH base AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM location_cache
  WHERE response->>'country' IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(response->>'country') <> ''
)
SELECT response->>'country'        AS country,
       response->>'country_code'   AS country_code,
       COUNT(*)                     AS cnt,
       ROUND(100.0*COUNT(*)/(SELECT n FROM base), 2) AS pct
FROM location_cache
WHERE response->>'country' IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(response->>'country') <> ''
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 15;
streaks:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak = 0)              AS bucket_0,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak BETWEEN 1 AND 2)  AS bucket_1_2,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak BETWEEN 3 AND 6)  AS bucket_3_6,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak BETWEEN 7 AND 13) AS bucket_7_13,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak BETWEEN 14 AND 29) AS bucket_14_29,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak BETWEEN 30 AND 59) AS bucket_30_59,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak >= 60)            AS bucket_60_plus,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak >= 7)             AS streak_ge7,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak >= 30)            AS streak_ge30,
  COUNT(*)                                                AS total_users,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak >= 7)  / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_ge7,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE current_streak >= 30) / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_ge30,
  MAX(longest_streak)                                     AS max_longest_streak
FROM streaks;
stickDauMau:
-- DAU/MAU stickiness for the last FULL day (anchor = CURRENT_DATE - 1 to skip today's partial day).
-- prayer_logs contains future-dated scheduled rows, so anchor on the calendar, never MAX(prayer_date).
WITH anchor AS (SELECT (CURRENT_DATE - 1) AS d)
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM prayer_logs, anchor
     WHERE prayer_date = anchor.d) AS dau,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM prayer_logs, anchor
     WHERE prayer_date > anchor.d - 30 AND prayer_date <= anchor.d) AS mau,
  ROUND(
    (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM prayer_logs, anchor WHERE prayer_date = anchor.d)::numeric
    / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM prayer_logs, anchor
               WHERE prayer_date > anchor.d - 30 AND prayer_date <= anchor.d),0), 3) AS dau_mau
stickSeries:
-- 8-week DAU/MAU series (each point = that week-end's DAU over its own trailing-30d MAU):
WITH anchors AS (
  SELECT generate_series((CURRENT_DATE - 1) - INTERVAL '49 days',
                         (CURRENT_DATE - 1), INTERVAL '7 days')::date AS d
)
SELECT a.d AS week_end,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.user_id) FROM prayer_logs pl WHERE pl.prayer_date = a.d) AS dau,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pl.user_id) FROM prayer_logs pl
     WHERE pl.prayer_date > a.d - 30 AND pl.prayer_date <= a.d) AS mau
FROM anchors a ORDER BY a.d
engagement:
SELECT
  prayer_name,
  count(*) AS total,
  round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='on_time') / count(*), 1) AS on_time_pct,
  round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='late')    / count(*), 1) AS late_pct,
  round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='missed')  / count(*), 1) AS missed_pct
FROM prayer_logs
WHERE prayer_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND prayer_date <= CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY prayer_name
ORDER BY array_position(ARRAY['fajr','dhuhr','asr','maghrib','isha']::text[], prayer_name::text);
